name: Harborlights Music Festival 2024
summary: Two-stage outdoor music festival across a single day with twelve acts and a community zone.
highlights: Coordinated 30+ vendors and a 60-person production crew
Hit load-in and load-out windows with zero overage charges
Net Promoter Score of 72 from attendee post-event survey

name: Northgate 25th Anniversary Gala
summary: Black-tie corporate gala with full plated dinner, three speakers, and a live broadcast to remote venues.
highlights: Designed the run-of-show template now standard across Northgate venues

name: Soundstage Product Launch
summary: Invite-only press and influencer launch event for a flagship consumer audio product.
highlights: Custom immersive AV experience with 12-channel spatial audio
Zero unplanned downtime across the four-hour live window
